# RayTracingDenoiser v4.11.4

## Overview
This release focuses on improving the robustness of the RayTracingDenoiser framework, particularly in the areas of GLSL compatibility, pixel handling, and temporal stability. Key improvements have been made to the RELAX and REBLUR components, addressing specific edge cases and enhancing overall denoising quality.

## Key Highlights 🌟
- Enhanced robustness in NRD implementation
- Fixed critical pixel handling issues in RELAX denoiser
- Improved checkerboard mode functionality
- Updated NRI integration to version 1.161

## Detailed Changes

### NRD (NVIDIA Real-time Denoising) Updates
#### Component Changes
- **GLSL Compatibility**
  - GLSL-related replacements now properly activate when not previously defined
  - Improves integration flexibility across different rendering pipelines
- **Robustness Improvements**
  - Enhanced overall stability of the denoising framework
  - Improved error handling and edge case management

### RELAX Denoiser Updates
#### Bug Fixes
- **HistoryClamping Pass Enhancement**
  - Fixed issue with pixels outside denoising range
  - Prevented potential garbage data access
  - Improved stability of temporal accumulation
  - Enhanced edge case handling

#### Feature Improvements
- **Checkerboard Mode**
  - Fixed incorrect data access on screen's left side
  - Improved overall checkerboard pattern handling
  - Enhanced compatibility with various screen configurations

### REBLUR Updates
#### Stability Improvements
- **TemporalStabilization Enhancement**
  - Refined image quality in split screen mode
  - Implemented pedantic improvements for visual consistency
  - Optimized temporal stability without compromising performance

## Integration Updates
### Version Updates
- NRI updated to version 1.161
  - Enhanced integration capabilities
  - Improved compatibility with latest graphics APIs
  - Updated documentation for seamless integration

## Performance Impact
- **Memory Usage**: No significant changes
- **GPU Performance**: Maintained previous performance levels while improving robustness
- **CPU Overhead**: Negligible impact from robustness improvements

## Compatibility
- Minimum Driver Version: [Previous version requirements maintained]
- Supported GPUs: All previously supported NVIDIA GPUs
- Operating Systems: Windows 10/11, Linux

## Documentation Updates
- Updated integration guides
- Refreshed API documentation
- Added new examples for GLSL implementations

## Known Issues
- No new known issues introduced in this release
- All previously reported issues in v4.11.3 have been addressed

## Installation
```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/NVIDIAGameWorks/RayTracingDenoiser.git
cd RayTracingDenoiser
# Checkout v4.11.4
git checkout v4.11.4
```

## Quick Start
```cpp
// Initialize NRD
nrd::DenoiserDesc denoiserDesc = {};
denoiserDesc.methodMask = nrd::Method::RELAX | nrd::Method::REBLUR;
```
